name: codex-review-gate
description: Claude Code plugin — forces codex:codex-rescue review before ExitPlanMode and git commit.

plugins.name: codex-review-gate
plugins.description: Hook-driven quality gate: blocks ExitPlanMode and large git commits until the codex:codex-rescue subagent has reviewed the current plan/staged-diff. Review markers are SHA fingerprints — any post-review change invalidates approval.
